parameters.query:
SELECT json_build_object(
  'projects_active', (SELECT count(*) FROM projects WHERE status='active' AND current_phase NOT IN ('completed','archived')),
  'projects_completed_7d', (SELECT count(*) FROM projects WHERE current_phase='completed' AND completed_at > now() - INTERVAL '7 days'),
  'invoices_paid_7d_eur', COALESCE((SELECT round(sum(total_amount)::numeric, 2) FROM invoices WHERE status='paid' AND paid_at > now() - INTERVAL '7 days'), 0),
  'invoices_pending', (SELECT count(*) FROM invoices WHERE status='pending'),
  'aftercare_open_urgent', (SELECT count(*) FROM aftercare_incidents WHERE status NOT IN ('resolved','closed','cancelled') AND severity IN ('high','critical')),
  'collab_overdue', (SELECT count(*) FROM collab_assignments WHERE status NOT IN ('approved','closed','cancelled','rejected') AND deadline IS NOT NULL AND deadline < now()::date),
  'consultations_pending', (SELECT count(*) FROM consultation_queue WHERE status='pending'),
  'contracts_expiring_7d', (SELECT count(*) FROM contracts WHERE status IN ('sent','ready_to_sign','draft') AND expires_at BETWEEN now() AND now() + INTERVAL '7 days'),
  'llm_cost_7d_usd', COALESCE(round((SELECT sum(cost_usd) FROM llm_calls WHERE occurred_at > now() - INTERVAL '7 days')::numeric, 2), 0),
  'llm_calls_7d', (SELECT count(*) FROM llm_calls WHERE occurred_at > now() - INTERVAL '7 days'),
  'health_score', (SELECT score FROM system_health_score),
  'health_color', (SELECT color FROM system_health_score),
  'top_projects_by_activity', (SELECT json_agg(t.* ORDER BY t.events DESC) FROM (
    SELECT p.name, count(al.*) AS events
      FROM projects p JOIN activity_log al ON al.project_id = p.id
     WHERE al.created_at > now() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND p.status='active'
     GROUP BY p.name ORDER BY events DESC LIMIT 5
  ) t)
) AS report;
SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key='architect_email'
